title: Add proof-of-API integration test exercising every public ferrolearn-bayes estimator end-to-end
description:
Final step of #241 audit. Create tests/api_proof.rs that:

1. For each of GaussianNB, MultinomialNB, BernoulliNB, ComplementNB, CategoricalNB:
   - Build with new() and with all builder params (with_alpha, with_class_prior, with_fit_prior, with_force_alpha, etc.)
   - fit() on a small synthetic dataset
   - Call predict, predict_proba, predict_log_proba, predict_joint_log_proba, score
   - Call partial_fit for a second mini-batch
   - Assert shapes, class probability sums-to-one, and that score on training data is sensible
2. For the conjugate module: exercise BetaBinomial, NormalNormal, etc. (whatever is exposed)

This file is the canonical 'every API surface compiles and runs' proof. Future PRs that change the public API must keep it green.
